name: Baker's Coconut Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the butter evenly in an 8- or 9-inch pie pan.
2. Sprinkle the Baker's Coconut over the butter and pat it evenly into the pan.
3. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) until crisp and golden brown (10 to 12 minutes).
4. Cool.
To serve:
1. Fill the crust with your favorite flavor of Jell-O Pudding and Pie Filling, made according to package directions, and chill until firm.
2. Alternatively, fill with ice cream and serve immediately.
